TITLE Sheet-Pan Gnocchi With Sausages and Peppers

# Heat oven to 425 degrees; convection bake.
# Thinly slice [1 item onion], [3 item bell pepper], [2 cloves garlic]
# On a sheet tray add sliced veg and combine:{[1 cup cherry tomatoes][1 tsp dried oregano] [1/2 tsp red chile flakes][1 tsp salt][1/4 cup olive oil]}; Toss everything to coat. Distribute evenly.
# Prick [1 lbs hot italian suasage] and nestle into the veg.
# Roast for 15 minutes. Mix and flip suasages.
# Roast for 20 minutes more and test for doneness.
# Top with [1/4 cup basil[, chopped]], and [1/4 cup parmesan].
